name: finra-pp-mcp
description: Every FINRA Query API dataset, plus local trend detection and batch registration checks no other FINRA tool offers.

finra_client_id.title: FINRA_CLIENT_ID
finra_client_id.description: Sets FINRA_CLIENT_ID for the FINRA MCP server.

finra_client_secret.title: FINRA_CLIENT_SECRET
finra_client_secret.description: Sets FINRA_CLIENT_SECRET for the FINRA MCP server.

finra_oauth_scope.title: FINRA_OAUTH_SCOPE
finra_oauth_scope.description: Sets FINRA_OAUTH_SCOPE for the FINRA MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.

finra_user_agent.title: FINRA_USER_AGENT
finra_user_agent.description: Sets FINRA_USER_AGENT for the FINRA MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.
